message.content:
You are implementing Task 24: Internationalization (i18n) for a loyalty card app.

**Working directory:** C:\Users\User\loyalty-app

**What to do:**

### 1. Install i18n dependencies for mobile

```bash
cd apps/mobile && npx expo install expo-localization && pnpm add i18next react-i18next
```

### 2. Create `apps/mobile/lib/i18n.ts`

```typescript
import i18n from 'i18next';
import { initReactI18next } from 'react-i18next';
import * as Localization from 'expo-localization';
import en from '../locales/en.json';
import fr from '../locales/fr.json';
import es from '../locales/es.json';
import ar from '../locales/ar.json';

i18n.use(initReactI18next).init({
  resources: {
    en: { translation: en },
    fr: { translation: fr },
    es: { translation: es },
    ar: { translation: ar },
  },
  lng: Localization.getLocales()[0]?.languageCode ?? 'en',
  fallbackLng: 'en',
  interpolation: { escapeValue: false },
});

export default i18n;
```

### 3. Create locale files

Create 4 JSON files in `apps/mobile/locales/`:

**`en.json`:**
```json
{
  "home": {
    "title": "My Cards",
    "empty": "No loyalty cards yet",
    "stamps": "{{count}} / {{goal}} stamps",
    "points": "{{count}} points"
  },
  "scan": {
    "title": "Scan QR Code",
    "scanning": "Point your camera at a QR code",
    "success": "Scan successful!",
    "error": "Scan failed. Please try again."
  },
  "rewards": {
    "title": "Rewards",
    "redeem": "Redeem",
    "stamps_required": "{{count}} stamps required",
    "points_required": "{{count}} points required",
    "empty": "No rewards available"
  },
  "profile": {
    "title": "Profile",
    "signOut": "Sign Out",
    "referral": "Referral Code",
    "language": "Language",
    "notifications": "Push Notifications"
  },
  "auth": {
    "login": "Log In",
    "register": "Sign Up",
    "email": "Email",
    "password": "Password",
    "name": "Full Name",
    "noAccount": "Don't have an account?",
    "hasAccount": "Already have an account?"
  },
  "common": {
    "loading": "Loading...",
    "error": "Something went wrong",
    "retry": "Retry",
    "cancel": "Cancel",
    "save": "Save",
    "back": "Back"
  }
}
```

**`fr.json`:**
```json
{
  "home": {
    "title": "Mes Cartes",
    "empty": "Aucune carte de fidélité",
    "stamps": "{{count}} / {{goal}} tampons",
    "points": "{{count}} points"
  },
  "scan": {
    "title": "Scanner QR Code",
    "scanning": "Dirigez votre caméra vers un QR code",
    "success": "Scan réussi !",
    "error": "Échec du scan. Réessayez."
  },
  "rewards": {
    "title": "Récompenses",
    "redeem": "Échanger",
    "stamps_required": "{{count}} tampons requis",
    "points_required": "{{count}} points requis",
    "empty": "Aucune récompense disponible"
  },
  "profile": {
    "title": "Profil",
    "signOut": "Déconnexion",
    "referral": "Code de Parrainage",
    "language": "Langue",
    "notifications": "Notifications Push"
  },
  "auth": {
    "login": "Connexion",
    "register": "Inscription",
    "email": "E-mail",
    "password": "Mot de passe",
    "name": "Nom complet",
    "noAccount": "Pas encore de compte ?",
    "hasAccount": "Déjà un compte ?"
  },
  "common": {
    "loading": "Chargement...",
    "error": "Une erreur est survenue",
    "retry": "Réessayer",
    "cancel": "Annuler",
    "save": "Sauvegarder",
    "back": "Retour"
  }
}
```

**`es.json`:**
```json
{
  "home": {
    "title": "Mis Tarjetas",
    "empty": "Sin tarjetas de fidelidad",
    "stamps": "{{count}} / {{goal}} sellos",
    "points": "{{count}} puntos"
  },
  "scan": {
    "title": "Escanear QR",
    "scanning": "Apunta tu cámara al código QR",
    "success": "¡Escaneo exitoso!",
    "error": "Error al escanear. Inténtalo de nuevo."
  },
  "rewards": {
    "title": "Recompensas",
    "redeem": "Canjear",
    "stamps_required": "{{count}} sellos requeridos",
    "points_required": "{{count}} puntos requeridos",
    "empty": "No hay recompensas disponibles"
  },
  "profile": {
    "title": "Perfil",
    "signOut": "Cerrar Sesión",
    "referral": "Código de Referencia",
    "language": "Idioma",
    "notifications": "Notificaciones Push"
  },
  "auth": {
    "login": "Iniciar Sesión",
    "register": "Registrarse",
    "email": "Correo electrónico",
    "password": "Contraseña",
    "name": "Nombre completo",
    "noAccount": "¿No tienes cuenta?",
    "hasAccount": "¿Ya tienes cuenta?"
  },
  "common": {
    "loading": "Cargando...",
    "error": "Algo salió mal",
    "retry": "Reintentar",
    "cancel": "Cancelar",
    "save": "Guardar",
    "back": "Volver"
  }
}
```

**`ar.json`:**
```json
{
  "home": {
    "title": "بطاقاتي",
    "empty": "لا توجد بطاقات ولاء",
    "stamps": "{{count}} / {{goal}} طوابع",
    "points": "{{count}} نقاط"
  },
  "scan": {
    "title": "مسح رمز QR",
    "scanning": "وجّه الكاميرا نحو رمز QR",
    "success": "تم المسح بنجاح!",
    "error": "فشل المسح. حاول مرة أخرى."
  },
  "rewards": {
    "title": "المكافآت",
    "redeem": "استبدال",
    "stamps_required": "{{count}} طوابع مطلوبة",
    "points_required": "{{count}} نقاط مطلوبة",
    "empty": "لا توجد مكافآت متاحة"
  },
  "profile": {
    "title": "الملف الشخصي",
    "signOut": "تسجيل الخروج",
    "referral": "رمز الإحالة",
    "language": "اللغة",
    "notifications": "الإشعارات"
  },
  "auth": {
    "login": "تسجيل الدخول",
    "register": "إنشاء حساب",
    "email": "البريد الإلكتروني",
    "password": "كلمة المرور",
    "name": "الاسم الكامل",
    "noAccount": "ليس لديك حساب؟",
    "hasAccount": "لديك حساب بالفعل؟"
  },
  "common": {
    "loading": "جاري التحميل...",
    "error": "حدث خطأ ما",
    "retry": "إعادة المحاولة",
    "cancel": "إلغاء",
    "save": "حفظ",
    "back": "رجوع"
  }
}
```

### 4. Import i18n in root layout

Read `apps/mobile/app/_layout.tsx` and add `import '../lib/i18n';` at the top of the imports.

### 5. Update key mobile screens to use translations

Read and update these files to use `useTranslation()` hook and `t()` function:
- `apps/mobile/app/(auth)/login.tsx` — Replace hardcoded strings with `t('auth.login')`, `t('auth.email')`, etc.
- `apps/mobile/app/(auth)/register.tsx` — Same pattern
- `apps/mobile/app/(tabs)/index.tsx` (home) — Replace "My Loyalty Cards" with `t('home.title')`, etc.
- `apps/mobile/app/(tabs)/rewards.tsx` — Replace hardcoded strings with `t('rewards.title')`, etc.
- `apps/mobile/app/(tabs)/scan.tsx` — Replace hardcoded strings with `t('scan.title')`, etc.

For each file:
1. Add `import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next';`
2. Add `const { t } = useTranslation();` inside the component
3. Replace English strings with `t('key')` calls

### 6. For the dashboard, install and configure next-intl

```bash
cd apps/dashboard && pnpm add next-intl
```

Create minimal setup:
- `apps/dashboard/src/i18n/request.ts` — Configure next-intl
- `apps/dashboard/messages/en.json` — English messages for dashboard
- `apps/dashboard/messages/fr.json` — French messages for dashboard

Keep the dashboard i18n minimal — just set up the infrastructure. Full translation of all dashboard pages can be done incrementally.

### 7. Commit

```bash
git add .
git commit -m "feat: add i18n with en/fr/es/ar"
```

**Important:**
- Read each file before modifying it
- Don't break existing functionality while adding translations
- Make sure the i18n import is added early in `_layout.tsx` (before other imports that depend on it)
- Do NOT skip the commit step

input.command:
cd C:/Users/User/loyalty-app && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add i18n with en/fr/es/ar

- Add i18next + react-i18next + expo-localization for mobile app
- Create locale files for English, French, Spanish, and Arabic
- Configure i18n with device locale detection and English fallback
- Update login, register, home, rewards, and scan screens to use translations
- Add next-intl infrastructure for dashboard with en/fr messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
The commit was successful. Here is a summary of everything that was done:

## TASK COMPLETE

**Commit:** `d74c61b` - feat: add i18n with en/fr/es/ar

### Files Created (9 new files)

**Mobile locale files:**
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/locales/en.json` - English translations
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/locales/fr.json` - French translations
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/locales/es.json` - Spanish translations
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/locales/ar.json` - Arabic translations

**Mobile i18n config:**
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/lib/i18n.ts` - i18next initialization with expo-localization for automatic device locale detection, fallback to English

**Dashboard i18n infrastructure:**
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/src/i18n/request.ts` - next-intl server config
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/messages/en.json` - English messages for dashboard
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/messages/fr.json` - French messages for dashboard

### Files Modified (7 files)

- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/app/_layout.tsx` - Added `import '../lib/i18n'` at the very top to initialize i18n before any other component renders
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/app/(auth)/login.tsx` - Added `useTranslation()` hook, replaced hardcoded strings ("Welcome Back", "Sign In", "Email", "Password", etc.) with `t()` calls
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/app/(auth)/register.tsx` - Added `useTranslation()` hook, replaced hardcoded strings ("Create Account", "Sign Up", "Full Name", etc.) with `t()` calls
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/app/(tabs)/index.tsx` - Added `useTranslation()` hook, replaced "My Cards", "Loading...", "No loyalty cards yet" with `t()` calls
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/app/(tabs)/rewards.tsx` - Added `useTranslation()` hook, replaced "Rewards", "Redeem", "Loading...", cost display strings with `t()` calls including interpolation
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/mobile/app/(tabs)/scan.tsx` - Added `useTranslation()` hook, replaced "Processing...", "Point at a loyalty QR code", alert titles with `t()` calls
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/package.json` - Added `next-intl` dependency
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/pnpm-lock.yaml` - Updated lockfile

### Key Details

- The mobile app uses **i18next** + **react-i18next** + **expo-localization** for automatic device locale detection
- Supported languages: English (en), French (fr), Spanish (es), Arabic (ar)
- Fallback language is English when the device locale is not supported
- Translation keys follow a `section.key` pattern (e.g., `auth.login`, `home.title`, `common.loading`)
- Interpolation is used for dynamic values: `t('home.stamps', { count: 5, goal: 10 })` renders "5 / 10 stamps"
- The dashboard uses **next-intl** with a minimal setup ready for incremental adoption
